steps.title: Find the narrator's focus
steps.content: The narrator goes to the bus stop to watch people work out through the gym window. He says there is nothing funnier and imagines the scene as The About to Pass Out Show.

steps.title: Match the main purpose
steps.content: A overemphasizes middle school, C invents an overcome problem, and D treats the made-up show as a real movie. The passage mainly describes watching gym-goers for amusement. The answer is B.
